The '''Atreyis system''', also known as the '''Vulta system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vulta]].

{{System-stub}}
